samples.pinyin: qǐng gàosù wǒ jùtǐ de yāoqiú.
samples.en: Please tell me the specific requirements.

samples.pinyin: tā duì jùtǐ xìjié hěn guānzhù.
samples.en: She pays close attention to specific details.

samples.sentence: 他的建議具體了我們的目標。
samples.pinyin: tā de jiànyì jùtǐle wǒmen de mùbiāo.
samples.en: His suggestions embodied our goals.

samples.sentence: 計劃需要進一步具體到細節。
samples.pinyin: jìhuà xūyào jìnyībù jùtǐ dào xìjié.
samples.en: The plan needs to be further embodied in details.

samples.meaning: Chilung or Keelung, city and major port in north Taiwan
samples.pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù Jīlóng kàn hǎi.
samples.en: We're going to Keelung to see the sea this weekend.

samples.pinyin: tā dàlì tiào qǐlái.
samples.en: She jumped up forcefully.
samples.vi: Cô ấy nhảy lên rất mạnh.

samples.pinyin: tā dàlì lāzhe wǒ.
samples.en: He tugged at me forcefully.

samples.pinyin: tā yǒu dà lìqì.
samples.en: He is very strong.
samples.vi: Anh ấy có sức mạnh lớn.

samples.pinyin: wǒ méiyǒu dà lìqì.
samples.en: I don't have much strength.
samples.vi: Tôi không có sức mạnh lớn.
